faq.title: Pos mporoume na sas voithisoume?
faq.subtitle: Vreite oles tis apantiseis gia tin agora, tis pliromes, tin paradosi kai ton exoplismo PV.
faq.noResultsHint: Dokimaste allous orous i periigithite stis katigories parakatho.
faq.contactSubtitle: I omada ypostirixis mas apanta se ligotero apo 2 lepta. Pollaploi diaytoi, antidrastiki, epaggelmatiki.
faq.ctaTitle: Etoimoi na sygkrinete tis kalyteres times PV?
faq.ctaSubtitle: Eggrafi dorean kai prosvasi se times B2B apo chiliades epiviomenos polites stin Eyropi.

delivery.label: Paradosi kai SUNTREX DELIVERY
delivery.description: Parakolouthisi dematoton, chronoi, epivevaiosi, asfalisi metaforas

registration.label: Eggraphi kai KYC
registration.description: Dimiourgia logariasmou, epaggelmatiki epivevaiosi, prosvasi timon

orders.q: Pos kano mia paraggelia sto SUNTREX?
orders.a: Meta tin eggraphi kai epivevaiosi logariasmou, periigithite ston katalogo. Kanete klik se mia prosfora, meta **"Enarxi diapragmateysi"**. Bisete se apefthias chat me ton politi gia na sizitisete times, posotites kai chronous. Meta ti simphonia, o politis epivevaionei kai lamvanete enan asphale syndemos pliromi Stripe.

To SUNTREX chrisimopoiei **Stripe** gia tin asfaleia kathe synallagis. Dektes: pistotiki karta (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), metafora SEPA kai amesi chreopiistisi SEPA. **3D Secure (SCA)** energopoiimeno. Oles oi pliromes se **EUR**.

To SUNTREX chreoni promithia **5% ana synallagi** — 5% chamitotero apo ton antagonismo. I promithia afaireitai aftomata kata ti metafora ston politi meso Stripe Connect. O politis vlepei to katharo poso. Choris kryfa kostos.
Kathe synallagi dimiourgei aftomata timologio sto **O logariasmos mou -> Oi agores mou**. Perilamvanei: endokoinotiko FPA, arithmous FPA, leptomeries proiontos. Lisi PDF opoiadipote stigmi.

Otan o politis den echei epivevaiosei tin apostoli, mporite na akyrosete apo ti selida synallagis me **"Akyrosi paraggelias"**. Aftomati epistrofi se 5-7 ergasimes imeres. Meta tin apostoli, prepei na akolouthisete ti diadikasia epistrofis.
To SUNTREX einai mia agora B2B — i diapragmateysi einai meros tis diadikasias. Apo ti selida proiontos, kanete klik **"Diapragmateysi timis"** gia apefthias chat me ton politi.

delivery.a: To **SUNTREX DELIVERY** einai i oloklirothiki ypiresia paradosis mas. Perilamvanei: parakolouthisi se pragmatiko chrono me monadiko kodiko QR, fotografies kata tin apostoli kai paralavi, chronosimata GPS, ilektroniki ypografi kai pliri asfalisi metaforas.
Pao sto **O logariasmos mou -> Oi agores mou** kai kanete klik ston arithmo parakolouthisis. Tha deite: thesi tou pakotou se pragmatiko chrono, fotografies, chronosimata GPS kai analytiki katastasi.
Oi chronoi exartontai apo tin topothesia. Mesos oros: **2-4 ergasimes imeres** esoterikou, **4-8 imeres** endoevropaikes. Oi akrivies chronoi ypologizontai aftomata kata tin paraggelia.

delivery.q: Ti na kano an to paketo ftasei katestrammeno?
delivery.a: Chari sto SUNTREX DELIVERY, echete fotografikes apodeixeis. Kata tin paralavi: **fotografiste amesos** kai simeiaste tis zhmies. Meta **Oi agores mou -> Anafora provlimatos**. I asfalisi kalyptei to 100% tis axias. Lysi se 48-72 ores.

Kathe paketo SUNTREX DELIVERY echei enan **monadiko kodiko QR**. Kata tin paralavi, skandarete to gia na: epivevaiosete tin authentikotita, epivivosite to periechomeno, deite fotografies apostolis kai epivivosite tin paralavi.

Echete **14 imeres** meta tin paralavi gia epistrofi. To proion prepei na einai stin archiki tou syskeyasia. Sto **Oi agores mou -> Epistrofi proiontos** tha parete etiketa epistrofis. Epistrofi chrimaton se 5-7 imeres meta epivevaiosi.

registration.a: I eggraphi einai dorean kai pernei ligotero apo 2 lepta. Kanete klik **"Eggraphi"**, sympliroste: epaggelmatiko email, onoma etaireias, chora kai kodiko prosvasis. Epivevaioste to email sas kai apoktiste amesa prosvasi stis times B2B.

To SUNTREX einai **gia epaggelmaties tou iliakoy tomea**. Oi times B2B einai krymmenes gia mi eggegrammenoYs episkeptes. Meta ti dimiourgia logariasmou, oles oi times xeklidonontai. Dorean kai stigmiaia.

registration.q: Ti einai to KYC kai giati einai aparaitito?
registration.a: To **KYC (Know Your Customer)** einai ypochreotiki epivevaiosi taftotitas. Sto SUNTREX, to KYC einai **aplopoiimeno**: onoma etaireias kai arithmos FPA einai arketoi. Gia polites: prostheti epivevaiosi Stripe (KYB). Diadikasia se 24-48 ores.

Meta ti dimiourgia logariasmou agoiasti, kanete klik **"Polise sto SUNTREX"** ston pinaka. Chreiazeste: plira stoicheia etaireias, arithmo FPA, onboarding Stripe Connect. Epivevaiosi apo tin omada mas se 24-48 ores.

To SUNTREX efarmozei ena proodeytiko systima **simaton empistosynis**: **Epiviomenos** (KYC + KYB Stripe), **Axiopisto** (10+ synallages choris diaphores), **Super Politis** (50+ synallages, vathmologia > 4.5/5).

registration.q: Xechasa ton kodiko prosvasis mou, ti na kano?
registration.a: Sti selida syndesis, kanete klik **"Xechasa ton kodiko"**. Vale to email — tha parete syndemos epanaforas ischy 1 oras. Elegxte ta spam. An to provlima synechizei: **support@suntrex.eu**.

technical.q: Pos epilego metaxy Huawei kai Deye inverter?
technical.a: Kai oi dyo markes diasthimes sto SUNTREX se antagonistikes times. **Huawei SUN2000**: apodedygmeni axiopiistia, monitoring FusionSolar. **Deye Hybrid**: exaireti sxesi posotitas-timis. Chrisimopoiiste ton **AI Sygkritiko** gia prosopiki systasi.

technical.q: Poia technologia panel na epilexo to 2026?
technical.a: To 2026 kyriarchei to **N-type TOPCon** me pano apo 70% ton apostolon. Pleonektimata: kalyteros vathmos apodosis (22-23%). Sto SUNTREX: **Risen Energy, Trina Solar, Jinko Solar, Canadian Solar, LONGi**.

technical.q: Pos na dimensionaro ena systima apothikeysi?
technical.a: Exartatai apo ti chrisi. **Aftokataanalosi**: choytikotita = nychtterini katanalosi x 1.2 (5-10 kWh). **Backup**: ischy x aftonomia. Sto SUNTREX: **Huawei LUNA2000**, **BYD HVS/HVM**, **Deye SE-G5.x** stis kalyteres times B2B.
Gia tin eyropa'iki agora: **IEC 61215** kai **IEC 61730** gia PV modules, **IEC 62109** gia inverters, **EN 50549-1/2** gia syndesi diktyo. Batteries: **IEC 62619** kai **UN 38.3**.

technical.q: Pos na elegxo ti symvatotita inverter-battery?
technical.a: Oloi oi kataskeyastes dimosievoun listes symvatotitas. Sto SUNTREX: kathe karta inverter deichnei symvates batteries. Elegxte: **evros tasis**, **protokolo epikoinonias** (CAN, RS485) kai **megisti ischy fortisis/ekfortisis**.

technical.q: Poia i diaphora metaxy string inverter kai micro-inverter?
technical.a: **String inverter** (Huawei, SMA, Sungrow): kentropoiimeni metatropi DC->AC. Pio oikonomiKO gia megales egkatastaseis. **Micro-inverter** (Enphase, Hoymiles): ena ana panel. Atomiki veltitopoiisi, ideaniKO me skiasei. **Optimizers** (Huawei, SolarEdge): veltitopoiisi ana panel me string inverter.

about.title: Schedia gia to SUNTREX
about.subtitle: I Eyropaiki agora B2B gia fotovoltaika
about.description: To SUNTREX einai i eyropaiki agora B2B gia fotovoltaiko exoplismo kai apothikeysi energias. Syndeoume egkatastates, dianomeis kai epaggelmaties iliakis energeias me epiviomenous polites se oli tin Eyropi.
about.missionText: Aplopoiisi tis proositis iliakoy exoplismou gia eyropaioyus epaggelmaties, me antagonistikes times, epiviomeni ypiresia paradosis kai exypna ergaleia.

cgv.title: Oroi kai Proi'potheseis
cgv.intro: Aftoi oi oroi kai proi'potheseis diepoun ti chrisi tis platformas SUNTREX kai tis synallages metaxy agoraston kai polition.
cgv.section1Text: To SUNTREX einai mia agora B2B pou syndei epaggelmaties tou fotovoltaikoy tomea. Oi synallages pragmatopoiountai apeftheias metaxy agoraston kai polition, me to SUNTREX os mesazo.
cgv.section2Text: To SUNTREX chreoni promithia 4,75% se kathe synallagi meso tis platformas. Oi pliromes asfalizontai meso Stripe Connect me pistopoiisi 3D Secure.

privacy.title: Politiki Aporritou
privacy.intro: To SUNTREX desmevetai na prostateyi tin idiotikotita ton christon toy symphona me ton Geniko Kanonismo gia tin Prostasia Dedomenon (GDPR).
privacy.dataCollectedText: Syllegoume mono ta dedomena pou einai aparaitita gia ti leitoyrgia tis platformas: plirofoories etairion, stoicheia epikoinonias, istoriko synallagon kai dedomena ploigisis.
privacy.dataUsageText: Ta dedomena sas chrisimopoiountai gia: diacheirisi logariasmou, epexergasia synallagon, veltiosi ton ypiresion mas kai, me ti sygkatathesi sas, apostoli emporikou ylikoy.
privacy.rightsText: Echete dikaioma prosvasis, diorthosis, diagrafis kai fortitotas ton dedomenon sas. Gia na askisete afta ta dikaiomata:

blog.title: Blog SUNTREX
blog.subtitle: Nea kai symvoules gia tin agora fotovoltaikon
blog.newsletterText: Lavete ta teleftaia nea tis agoras.
